reasoning: This workout targets your poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance by directly addressing the 25W drop evident in your power curve. Your last ride was relatively easy, so you're primed for a challenging workout. By practicing over-unders, we simulate the energy demands of the main climb on the Alpine Loop event.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x15-minute over-unders: 2 min at 242W, 3 min at 218W, repeat; 5 min rest between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
